steps.title: Set up the contrast
steps.content: The first sentence lists several major accomplishments. The next sentence says that one honor surpasses everything else in Moore's career, so the relationship is a contrast.

steps.title: Mark the exceptional honor
steps.content: Choice A signals a result. Choice C would make the honor just another example, and Choice D signals an ordered list. The sentence needs a transition that contrasts the earlier accomplishments with the unmatched honor. The answer is B.
